features: [10 Sheet Cross-Cut Capacity] Shreds up to 10 sheets (A4 size 80g/m²) at once, and can handle credit cards (excluding metal ones) and plastic cards. Cuts paper into 5x18mm pieces, making reconstruction nearly impossible
[For Home & Small Office] Shreds continuously for up to 4 minutes, with a 40-minute cooldown. Ideal for home and small office use
[Easy Operation] Features auto start, manual reverse for jam removal, and automatic stop when the top is lifted. Overheat management helps extend the shredder’s life
[Compact & Portable] Comes with a 21-liter bin and transparent window to minimize emptying. The top handle makes it easy to move, and its compact size fits under desks

[Important Note] 1. Avoid using or storing aerosol products, such as cleaners, flammable liquids, gases or oils, in or around the shredder. 2. Regularly inspect and clean the cutter to avoid paper jams caused by machine overload. *Refer to the user manual before use
[Quality Tested] Each shredder undergoes rigorous testing before shipment, so you may find some paper shreds from the testing process
[Use Tips] Please do not shred greeting cards with sound chips or batteries to avoid fire or electric shock

[Use Tips] Please do not use the shredder to shred items other than those specified, such as Large paper clips, CDs/DVDs, insulated envelopes, unopened junk mail, adhesive materials, newspapers, continuous computer paper, cardboard, metal credit cards, laminated documents and magazines
description: From the manufacturer Multi-purpose 10-sheet Cross-cut home and small office shredder Bonsaii DocShred C209-D Paper Shredder's simple features make it easy to use and perfect for your home office. The maximum shredding capacity of this home and small office shredder with high-security is 10 sheets of paper at a single pass, and the paper will be shredded into small particles measuring 5x40mm. The shredder machine can be used to destroy ATM receipts, credit-card bills, pay stubs, and other unwanted documents. It will even destroy credit cards—perfect for getting rid of expired or unnecessary cards to keep most of your confidential information safe. For disposal of your cross cut shredders paper waste, the Bonsaii C209-D personal paper shredder features a handy spacious 21-litre bin with large transparent window. Multi-purpose Shredder Easy to Empty 21-liter wastebasket with portable handle design and large transparent window makes it easy to see when the bin is full and to empty. Durable Solid Cutters and Professional Steel Blades Bonsaii shredders are built to last with solid steel cutters, which can easily destroy paper as well as credit cards, clips and staples to keep your different types of confidential information safe. No Hassle and Easy Operation With Light-operated function, the shredder begins automatically than ever once the sensor detects something to be shredded. For safe operation, this paper shredder will stop working once you lift up the shredding part.
